description: Job role to NetSuite role mappings with business justifications

revenue_director.title: Revenue Director
revenue_director.description: Oversees revenue recognition, invoicing, and revenue reporting

typical_netsuite_roles.justification: Need to manage revenue recognition process and oversee revenue operations
Need approval authority for revenue transactions to ensure proper oversight
typical_netsuite_roles.business_need: Revenue Directors typically need both management and approval authority for operational efficiency

typical_netsuite_roles.justification: Too broad - Controller role has full financial system access
typical_netsuite_roles.recommendation: Use Revenue Manager + Revenue Approver instead

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Standard combination for Revenue Director role requiring both process management and approval authority

accounts_payable_manager.title: Accounts Payable Manager
accounts_payable_manager.description: Manages accounts payable process, vendor payments, and vendor relationships

typical_netsuite_roles.justification: Core AP processing and vendor bill management

typical_netsuite_roles.business_need: AP Managers may need visibility into billing but not full control

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Standard single role for AP Manager

level_adjustments.Fivetran - Billing Manager: Reduce to View level for oversight only

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Provides visibility into billing process while maintaining separation

accounts_receivable_manager.title: Accounts Receivable Manager
accounts_receivable_manager.description: Manages accounts receivable process, customer payments, and collections

typical_netsuite_roles.justification: Core AR processing and customer payment management

controller.title: Controller
controller.description: Chief accounting officer responsible for all financial operations and reporting

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Executive-level role requires broad access for financial oversight. Extensive compensating controls required due to high privilege level.
Controller may need tax oversight in addition to general accounting. Requires executive approval.

senior_accountant.title: Senior Accountant
senior_accountant.description: Performs complex accounting tasks, journal entries, and reconciliations

typical_netsuite_roles.recommendation: Assign to different accountants for proper segregation

tax_manager.title: Tax Manager
tax_manager.description: Manages tax compliance, filings, and tax planning

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Both roles primarily provide read-only access for analysis

accounting_manager.title: Accounting Manager / Corporate Accounting Manager
accounting_manager.description: Oversees general accounting operations, journal entries, and financial close

typical_netsuite_roles.business_need: May need both general and technical accounting oversight

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Manager-level role requires oversight but with appropriate controls

system_administrator.title: NetSuite System Administrator
system_administrator.description: Manages NetSuite system configuration and user access

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Developer access requires strict change management controls

restrictions.reason: IT roles should not have operational financial access to maintain segregation between IT and business operations

netsuite_administrator.title: NetSuite Administrator
netsuite_administrator.description: Full-time NetSuite administrator responsible for system configuration, user management, security, integrations, and technical oversight. Requires comprehensive access to both administrative and financial modules for troubleshooting, testing, and system maintenance.

typical_netsuite_roles.justification: Core administrative privileges for system configuration, user management, security settings, and technical administration

Financial module access required for: (1) Troubleshooting financial integrations and workflows, (2) Testing financial configurations in production, (3) Supporting finance users with technical issues, (4) Configuring financial approval workflows and automation
typical_netsuite_roles.business_need: NetSuite Administrators need both system admin AND financial access to effectively support and maintain the financial system. They are the technical experts who configure, troubleshoot, and maintain all financial workflows.

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: STANDARD AND EXPECTED configuration for NetSuite Administrator role. Administrators require both system-level AND financial access to: (1) Configure financial workflows and approval processes, (2) Troubleshoot financial integrations and automations, (3) Test financial configurations in production environment, (4) Support finance users with technical/system issues, (5) Implement and maintain financial controls and customizations. This is NOT a segregation violation - it is the proper configuration for the Systems Engineering team member responsible for NetSuite administration.
monitoring_requirements: All financial transactions reviewed by Finance team
Monthly audit of admin activities in financial modules
Real-time alerts for any financial transaction processing
Separate audit trail for admin vs. business user activities
restricted_activities: Processing actual financial transactions for business purposes
Approving vendor payments or customer invoices
Creating or modifying financial master data (customers, vendors) without request
acceptable_role_combinations.risk_mitigation: NetSuite Administrators should NOT process business transactions. Their financial access is for TECHNICAL purposes only (configuration, testing, troubleshooting). All actual business transactions are performed by Finance team with proper approval workflows. Admin activities are logged and audited separately.

acceptable_role_combinations.business_justification: Admin-only access without financial privileges. Suitable for administrators who only need system configuration without financial module access.

restrictions.acceptable_note: Unlike other IT roles, NetSuite Administrators CAN have financial access because their job is to ADMINISTER the financial system, not perform business operations. The key distinction is PURPOSE: technical administration vs. business operations.
